title: Capital Ship Bonds
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS total FROM CapShipBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT AwardingFaction AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS value FROM CapShipBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY AwardingFaction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr earned in capital ship combat bonds during the report period.
details.help: CapShipBond fires when participating in capital ship destruction in a high-intensity conflict zone. Rare and high-value events.

tagLines: Capital vessel engagement bond submissions processed. Fleet Command acknowledges your participation.
You helped take down a capital ship. That's not a Tuesday for most pilots.
Capital ship bonds are paid for one reason — because something enormous needed to be destroyed.
